  * QruiseML 
    * [ Introduction  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/qruiseml/intro/)
    * Example notebooks 
      * Qubit system modelling 
        * Two-level systems 
          * [ Simulating a closed two-level quantum system  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/notebooks/two_level_systems/two_level_system_closed/)
          * [ Simulating an open two-level quantum system  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/notebooks/two_level_systems/two_level_system_open/)
          * [ Robust optimal control on a single spin  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/notebooks/two_level_systems/two_level_system_robust/)
        * Superconducting qubits 
          * [ Simulation & optimal control of a single superconducting qubit  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/notebooks/transmon_3lvl/transmon_sim_and_qoc/)
          * [ Simulating an SNZ gate  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/notebooks/snz_gate/snz_gate/)
        * NV centres 
          * [ Simulation of a single NV centre qubit  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/notebooks/nv_centres/nv_centres_single_spin_sim_and_qoc/)
          * [ Simulation and robust optimal control of a single NV centre  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/notebooks/nv_centres/nv_centres_single_spin_sim_and_qoc_robust/)
          * [ Simulation & optimal control of a single-qubit gate in an NV quantum processor  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/notebooks/nv_centres/nv_centres_1Q_nuclei_gate_sim_and_qoc/)
          * [ Simulation & optimal control of a two-qubit gate on nuclear spins in an NV quantum processor  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/notebooks/nv_centres/nv_centres_2Q_nuclei_gate_sim_and_qoc/)
        * Spin qubits 
          * [ Simulation & optimal control of a single spin qubit  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/notebooks/spin_qubits/spin_sim_and_qoc/)
        * Trapped ions 
          * [ Simulating a Mølmer-Sørensen gate  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/notebooks/trapped_ions/molmer_sorensen_gate/)
      * Control stack modelling 
        * [ Arbitrary waveform generator  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/notebooks/control_stack/arbitrary_waveform_generator/)
        * [ Analogue-to-digital converter  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/notebooks/control_stack/analogue_digital_converter/)
        * [ Rise time  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/notebooks/control_stack/gaussian_rise_time/)
        * [ Transfer function  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/notebooks/control_stack/transfer_function/)
        * [ Optimising with frozen signal-chain parameters  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/notebooks/control_stack/freeze_keys_optimisation/)
  * QruiseMR 
    * [ Introduction  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/qruisemr/intro/)
  * [ Basic Concepts  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/basic-concepts/)
  * API Reference 
    * [ qruise-kb  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/api-reference/kb/)
    * [ qruise-toolset  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/api-reference/toolset/)
    * [ qruise-experiment  ](https://docs.qruise.com/latest/api-reference/experiment/)
